```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "ONBOARDING_LOG is generated in skill_provision.md containing the temporary password, passed through shared agent context to skill_notify.md, and transmitted unencrypted via both SMTP (port 25 without TLS) to the employee and via unencrypted mail command to the IT admin list.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via openssl and stores it in ONBOARDING_LOG (containing 'log of all provisioning actions taken, including the temporary password'). This ONBOARDING_LOG is output to shared agent context and consumed by skill_notify.md as input. skill_notify.md then sends ONBOARDING_LOG to it-admins@company.com via plaintext mail command (line 3 of Behavior section) and also includes TEMP_PASSWORD in the welcome email body sent via SMTP on port 25 without TLS encryption (line 2 of Behavior section). Both transmissions cross the trust boundary to external recipients without encryption."
}
```
